scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && yarn dev" "cd frontend && yarn dev --host" "cd apps/relay-explorer && yarn dev --host --port 5174" "cd apps/blossom-explorer && yarn dev --host --port 5175" "cd apps/nsite-explorer && yarn dev --host --port 5176" "cd apps/grasp-explorer && yarn dev --host --port 5178" "cd apps/hello-world && yarn dev:server" "cd apps/hello-world && yarn dev:client"
scripts.build:apps: yarn workspace app-relay-explorer build && yarn workspace app-blossom-explorer build && yarn workspace app-nsite-explorer build && yarn workspace app-grasp-explorer build && yarn workspace app-hello-world build
